goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The Pantry E2E spec and preserved mirror are acceptable. All 75 full-format failures are unrelated: 73 tracked-clean pre-Pantry baseline files and two concurrent Nutrition files. No Pantry path or the new spec failed. Continue remaining verification in the preserved mirror without formatting or repairing unrelated files.

worker_package.objective: Complete scoped formatting, full quality/build gates, focused Playwright accessibility/screenshots, disposable migration/database checks, and source diff integrity in the preserved isolated mirror without source edits.
verify: Re-audit mirror isolation, junction, spec hash, and port 3100
Run full lint, typecheck, tests, OpenAPI, and build
Run focused Pantry Playwright workflow with accessibility and screenshots
stop_if: Unrelated source edits, live provider/credentials, Docker/device/backup, normal DB, shared .next, or non-disposable persistence is required.

evidence: The mirror excludes Git, .next, data, test artifacts, credentials, environment, and logs and has one intended node_modules junction.
Source and mirror E2E spec hashes match and port 3100 is clear.
Exactly 75 full-format failures are unrelated baseline or concurrent Nutrition ownership; zero are Pantry-owned.

parallel_safety.rationale: Verification uses one mirror, port, generated state, and disposable database.

required_board_updates: Do not activate T999 until all gates pass.
